expectations.text: Provides a numerical score for the original prompt with specific grades per dimension
expectations.evidence: No numerical scoring or grading system used. Provides qualitative analysis only.

expectations.text: Identifies the 2-3 weakest dimensions with specific feedback on why they are weak
expectations.evidence: Identifies 6 issues in table format: no endpoint details, no style guide, no format spec, no examples, no tone/voice, no structural requirements

expectations.text: Recommends a specific prompting framework (e.g., RTF, SCOPE, TRACE) and explains why
expectations.evidence: No named framework recommended. Uses general prompt engineering concepts but doesn't reference RTF, SCOPE, or any formal framework.

expectations.text: Provides a complete rewritten prompt that is clearly better structured
expectations.evidence: Provides a comprehensive improved prompt with role, endpoint details, style guide, reference example, and error documentation

expectations.text: Shows before and after scores to quantify the improvement
expectations.evidence: No before/after scoring. Only qualitative analysis.

expectations.text: Explicitly names the prompting techniques applied (e.g., Role Assignment, Few-Shot, Negative Constraint)
expectations.evidence: Names techniques in table: Role assignment, Structured input, Constraint specification, Few-shot prompting, Completeness constraint, Style enforcement, Emphasis directive
